title: Oil surges past $103 on blockade
snippet: Brent crude past $103/bbl (+7%), WTI $104/bbl (+7.8%). Brent +40% since war start, WTI +50%. FAO warns global food crisis if normal Hormuz traffic doesn't resume. Ghalibaf: 'so-called blockade will make Americans nostalgic for $4-5 gas'.
tag_reason: Update of Apr 12 oil surge (src-103). New data: prices continued rising on blockade implementation. FAO food crisis warning is new detail.
